nasb.text: A wise man is cautious and turns away from evil, But a fool is arrogant and careless.

esv.text: One who is wise is cautious and turns away from evil, but a fool is reckless and careless.

cnv.text: 智慧人敬畏耶和華，遠離惡事； 愚昧人卻驕傲自恃。

ccb.text: 智者小心谨慎，远离恶事； 愚人骄傲自负，行事鲁莽。

csbs.text: 智慧人有所畏惧，远离恶事； 愚昧人鲁莽易怒，无所惧怕。
